sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114263" key="xoei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χοεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n114263.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παχὺ ἔντερον</ref> </xr> (i. e. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χόριον</ref> </xr>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
